prompt: A nostalgic watercolor anime poster on textured off-white paper, composed as a vertical double-exposure illustration inspired by late-1990s adventure anime. The main silhouette is the left-side profile of a young boy wearing large swim goggles pushed up on his head, his face turned to the right, with the silhouette filled by a dreamlike montage of memories and fantasy scenes. Inside the upper center of the silhouette, show 8 children from behind standing together on a ridge and looking toward a glowing, distant crystalline tower beneath a circular celestial portal in a cloudy blue-violet sky; include 7 small creature companions among them. On the upper right inside the silhouette, place a large dragon-like monster emerging from the clouds. Near the center, add a glowing round handheld digital device with a small screen, radiating light. In the middle-lower area, depict 2 iconic small dinosaur-like creatures sitting above an old shrine approach, one purple horned creature and one small yellow reptilian creature. In the lower area, show a mossy torii gate, overgrown stone steps, utility poles, and a small rural train on the right, all wrapped in mist and foliage. At the very bottom, include the 8 children again as tiny silhouettes walking away together along a path, reinforcing the theme of friendship and remembrance. Use soft ink-and-watercolor washes, muted blues, indigo, lavender, sepia, and warm golden highlights, with splattered pigment edges and painterly cloud textures. Keep the composition airy and elegant, with a refined modern poster-design sensibility and almost no generic AI gloss. Add vertical Japanese text on the right side reading あの日、僕たちは選ばれた。あの日、デジモンと出会った。 and place a Japanese title logo at the lower left reading デジモンアドベンチャー, with a small English subtitle “DIGIMON ADVENTURE” and the date line “1999 - 永遠の冒険”.
